src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/ServerA.general_idea: Enable Spring's scheduling support to allow the use of @Scheduled annotations for background tasks.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone class using SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6+ requirements for Java 21.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain configure(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Add @EnableMethodSecurity annotation to enable method-level security pre-post annotations, replacing the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity.
Update HTTP security configuration to use the new authorizeHttpRequests lambda API instead of the deprecated authorizeRequests builder.
Register the custom JWT filter using the new HttpSecurity builder API instead of the old addFilterBefore with specific filter classes.
Explicitly define a CorsFilter bean and enable CORS in HttpSecurity to handle cross-origin requests, replacing implicit or previous configurations.
Introduce a PasswordEncoder bean using PasswordEncoderFactories, likely required for new security features or compliance with stricter Spring Security defaults.
Replace Firebase-specific pre-authentication provider and filter with a generic JwtRequestFilter, simplifying the authentication chain.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.general_idea: Migrate the UserRepository from Spring Data JPA to jOOQ for database access.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.human_impl: Changed class from interface extending JpaRepository to class using DSLContext and Zkmf2024UserDao.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace manual SLF4J logger instantiation with Lombok @Slf4j annotation for cleaner code.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed 'private static final Logger logger...' and added '@Slf4j' annotation, changing 'logger.info' to 'log.info'.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Update validation imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3/Java 21.
Remove dependency on Firebase Authentication in favor of internal JWT-based authentication.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed imports for 'com.google.firebase.auth.*' and deleted the Firebase-specific registration logic.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Implement new login endpoint using internal UserRepository, PasswordEncoder, and JwtService.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added '/public/auth' POST endpoint that validates password against DB and returns JWT via 'jwtService.createJwt'.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace stub helper registration with actual service call and switch expression for response handling.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Called 'helperRegistrationService.register(request)' and used 'switch (result)' to return appropriate HTTP status codes.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace stub newsletter registration with actual service call and switch expression for response handling.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Called 'newsletterService.register(request)' and used 'switch (result)' to return appropriate HTTP status codes.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Add @Valid annotation to request bodies to enable Bean Validation.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added '@Valid' before '@RequestBody' in registerHelper and registerNewsletter methods.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Rename DTO classes to follow standard naming conventions (ending in DTO).
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Changed imports and usage from 'RegisterHelperRequestDto' to 'RegisterHelperRequestDTO', etc.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Inject new services required for the refactored authentication and registration logic.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added fields and constructor parameters for NewsletterService, HelperRegistrationService, JwtService, PasswordEncoder, and ApplicationProperties.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/se.general_idea: Replace direct domain object method call with explicit enum valueOf conversion to decouple from the User entity structure.
Remove import for javax.persistence.EntityNotFoundException as it is no longer used in the code.
Update import for UserRole to point to the new DTO package instead of the domain package.
Use the no-argument orElseThrow() method instead of explicitly passing the EntityNotFoundException constructor reference.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.2.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Rename the Maven artifact ID to match the new project naming convention.
Bump the project version to 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.
Upgrade MapStruct dependency to a version compatible with newer Java/Spring.
Add JJWT dependencies for JWT handling, replacing or supplementing previous auth mechanisms.
Add Apache POI dependencies for Excel file processing.
Add Apache POI OOXML dependencies for modern Excel format support.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to build the Angular frontend during the Maven build process.
Add typescript-generator-maven-plugin to generate TypeScript definitions from Java DTOs.
Add SonarQube Maven plugin for code quality analysis.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add explicit Maven Surefire plugin version for test execution.
Add database connection properties for local development.
Add SonarCloud organization and project key properties.
Add Spring Boot Web starter for REST API support.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter for bean validation.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter for email sending capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Thymeleaf starter for server-side templating.
Add Spring Boot WebFlux starter for reactive web support.
Add Spring Boot jOOQ starter for type-safe SQL queries.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 for utility methods.
Switch database driver from MySQL to PostgreSQL.
Update Testcontainers dependencies to use PostgreSQL instead of MySQL.
Remove Firebase Admin SDK dependency as it is no longer used.
Remove legacy javax.mail dependency in favor of Spring Boot Mail starter.
Remove legacy javax.activation dependency.
Remove Spring Boot JDBC starter as jOOQ is now used.
Remove Spring Boot JPA starter as jOOQ is now used.
Remove Spring Boot Data REST starter.
Add a Maven profile for production builds that includes frontend building.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper JAR to version 3.2.0 to align with modern build tooling standards.
Upgrade the bundled Maven distribution to version 3.9.6 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and modern plugin features.

.run/ServerApplication.run.xml.general_idea: Configure the IDE run configuration to explicitly use Java 21 as the execution runtime.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script from version 0.5.6 to 3.2.0 to align with modern Maven standards.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed header comment to 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0' and updated download URLs to point to org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper/3.2.0.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace deprecated backtick command substitution with modern $() syntax for better readability and nesting support.
mvnw.human_impl: Replaced instances of `command` with $(command) throughout the script, e.g., `uname` to $(uname).

mvnw.general_idea: Ensure the wrapper script works correctly on Windows with Git Bash auto-CRLF by stripping carriage returns from configuration values.
mvnw.human_impl: Added tr -s '\r\n' ' ' in concat_lines and logic to remove '\r' from values read from wrapper properties.

mvnw.general_idea: Add explicit error handling for directory changes to prevent silent failures in path resolution.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed cd commands to include '|| exit 1' or similar error checks, e.g., cd "$wdir/.." || exit 1.

mvnw.general_idea: Modernize Java home detection logic to use standard command resolution instead of legacy M2_HOME resolution.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed M2_HOME resolution logic and updated JAVA_HOME detection to use $(/usr/libexec/java_home) and $(command -v java).

mvnw.general_idea: Introduce a structured logging function to support verbose output controlled by MVNW_VERBOSE.
mvnw.human_impl: Added log() function that prints only if MVNW_VERBOSE is true, replacing direct echo statements.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from https to http to match the specific version referenced in the wrapper template.
